title: PlanReviewGroundingOutput
description: OUTPUT of `plan_review_grounding`: `code_grounded` is true iff ANY Pass-1 finding cites a CODEBASE_GROUNDED criterion (E4/G1G2/A1/G6) — the boolean the dynamic Pass-2 verify branch reads to pick the agentic vs single-turn verifier (parity with bespoke pass2_verify(agentic=grounded)).

code_grounded.description: True iff any finding cites a code-grounded criterion → run the agentic verifier.
